name: superpower-dev
description: Governance entry skill `do` for selecting Superpowers planning and execution workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Governance entry skill for Superpowers workflow routing.
interface.longDescription: Provides the `do` skill as a governance entrypoint to route requests across brainstorming, planning, and execution skills with executor and worktree guardrails.
defaultPrompt: Use `do` to route this task through the right Superpowers workflow.
Use `do` to choose between subagent-driven-development and executing-plans.
Use `do` to infer the relevant spec/plan and continue.
